known_runtime_fidelity_debt: The regular KO entries retain their exact source wavetable, duration-proven prefix, initial pitch, and volume envelope; source pitch automation is not yet scheduled on DS channels.
DeadExplodeL currently renders its primary UCD voice; forked source voice 685 remains explicit metadata fidelity debt.
